jobs.name: Daily Status Check
jobs.message: Run a brief daily status check. Post a short summary to Discord channel <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID> using: node /path/to/scripts/discord-post.js <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID> "<message>". Reply HEARTBEAT_OK when done.

jobs.name: Weekly Summary
jobs.message: Write a brief weekly summary based on memory/active-threads.md and recent daily notes. Post to Discord channel <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID>. Reply HEARTBEAT_OK when done.

jobs.name: Weekly Orphan Check
jobs.message:
Weekly orphan check — surface ONLY actionable orphans, not noise. The naive version of this check (strict TOOLS.md/AGENTS.md mention) flags ~75% of every script as orphan because tests, cron-managed jobs, and dependencies aren't mentioned in those files. That's noise, not signal.

A file is NOT an orphan if any of:
- It's a *.test.* / *.test.js / *.test.mjs / *.test.sh file (tests don't need TOOLS.md entries)
- Its name appears in /workspace/crons/jobs.json (cron-managed)
- It's referenced from /workspace/start.sh, /workspace/restart-loop.sh, or any other top-level *.sh
- It's referenced from another script in /workspace/scripts/
- It's documented in any /workspace/memory/skills/*.md
- It was modified in the last 7 days (active development)

A file IS an orphan if all exclusions above fail AND it hasn't been touched in 30+ days AND its filename suggests one-off / temp work (leading underscore, 'tmp', 'migrate', 'old', 'fix', 'temp' in the name) OR it has no callers anywhere.

Steps:
1. List candidate scripts in /workspace/scripts/ (top-level, not subdirs)
2. Apply exclusion rules; flag survivors as 'truly orphan'
3. Same logic for memory/references/ vs MEMORY.md (lighter — those just need MEMORY.md mention)
4. Find tmp-* files older than 7 days in /workspace/ (find /workspace -maxdepth 1 -name 'tmp-*' -mtime +7)

If zero orphans across all three categories: reply HEARTBEAT_OK silently. Do NOT post a 'no orphans' message.
Otherwise post ONCE:
  node /workspace/scripts/discord-post.js <YOUR_CHANNEL_ID> "🔍 Orphan Check — <date>\nStale scripts (N): <names>. Stale references (N): <names>. Tmp >7d: None ✅ OR <names>."

Keep under 1500 chars. Do not retry or post twice.
